title: About the Hire an Expert category
excerpt: If you are looking for a more complicated workflow setup, support and guidance in your language or custom-built integrations, you can find an expert to help you here!

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml: If you are looking for a more complicated workflow setup, support and guidance in your language or custom-built integrations, you can find an expert to help you here!

posts.author: kolinhayes (Kolin Hayes)
posts.cookedHtml: Are there any requirements for one to be a consultant?

posts.author: Avital-monday.com (Avital Cohen)
posts.cookedHtml:
@kolinhayes the ones that offered their consultancy service are part of our resellers’ program (you can find them here- https://monday.com/partners/find-a-partner/).
Feel free to reach out to me at avital@monday.com to get more details on the program.

posts.author: Jack-JTsCloud (Jack Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Looking forward to helping people to maximise monday.com in their businesses!

Reach out to me if you’re in Australia or New Zealand would love to discuss your needs.

posts.author: SparkProjects (E Kenyon)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Jack, I’m a project manager at Spark Interact, a small digital marketing and web development company in Sydney. We are moving from WorkflowMax to Monday.com and could really use some assistance in getting the boards set up for the way we work. Is this something you could help us with?
Kind regards, Elizabeth

posts.author: Jack-JTsCloud (Jack Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
@SparkProjects

Hi Elizabeth, we’d be glad to assist you with this, please send an email to Reane in our team renae@jtscloud.com and she’ll be super glad to assist you with this setup.

Best,
Jack

posts.author: SparkProjects (E Kenyon)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks, Jack, I’ve emailed Renae as suggested.

posts.author: CristyLimegrover (Cristy Limegrover )
posts.cookedHtml: I’m new to the community, but not monday! Currently located in Texas and work with clients near and far to improve their monday.com operations. If you are looking to be more efficient and improve your monday.com workspace I’d love to help.

posts.author: JenniferRoy (Jennifer Roy)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Cristy! If you are still offering assistance I would love to have you contact me. My email is JRoy@MCRLabs.com. My name is Jennifer. Thanks!

posts.author: CristyLimegrover (Cristy Limegrover )
posts.cookedHtml: I’ll send you an email now. . . my apologies for the delay in this email. I look forward to hearing more about your project!

posts.author: timlittletech (Tim Little)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello all,
my name is Tim Little and I’m helping businesses start up and improve their workflows with monday.com. I’m located in Sunny San Diego and helping folks in Southern California and beyond!
I’d love to partner with your company to build and improve your sales and customer workflows. Shoot me an email if your interested in working together: tim@timlittletech.com

Happy to help!

posts.cookedHtml:

Thank you

posts.cookedHtml:

My name is Cristy, I am located in Texas and am passionate about monday.com. I have worked with clients from Texas to California to customize the app. I’d love to schedule a Zoom call and get more insight about what features you are hoping to attain from the app.

posts.cookedHtml:

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, everyone. Polished Geek is based out of NC, USA and works with clients across the globe. Some of you may recognize our username as we are quite active in the community here and in the Facebook group as well. As a product-certified monday․com partner, we love helping our clients do more with monday․com, every single day. My team includes business process automation experts, custom integration and app developers and monday․com certified consultants. So no matter your monday challenge, we can probably help (and if for some reason we can’t, we’ll candidly tell you so and direct you to someone else who can).

If anyone would like to learn more about how Polished Geek can help you do more with monday․com, you are welcome to book a time here: Book a call with Polished Geek: Do more with monday․com

~ Deb Cinkus
Founder & Principal monday․com Consultant, Polished Geek

posts.cookedHtml:

Thank you.

posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!

We are Pygmy Elephant Travel, a company based in the US with a branch in Germany that sells high-mountain hiking itineraries around the globe. We are already Monday users but we’re looking for a consultancy to improve our processes inside the application.

Thank you!

posts.author: timlittletech (Tim Little)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Cobawsky! Welcome to the monday.com community!

I’ve helped many small and medium size businesses with optimizing monday.com and integrating with other internal systems (quickbooks, timetrackers, shopify, etc…)

I would love to sit down with you to discuss your specific needs and see if we are a good fit to work together.
Feel free to schedule a free consult at this link: Calendly - Tim Little

Best!

posts.author: LaurenBemister (Lauren Bemister)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Cobawsky !

If you are still looking for help, I’d be happy to meet with you and see if our team might be able to assist you.

A bit about us, our team has specialized in Monday.com for three years now, and we love the software! Our team consists of Monday.com experts, project managers, and a developer/﻿Zapier expert, so you will never have to wait for answers. We provide an all-in-one system, where we dream up and implement the processes you need with ease and provide ongoing support.

We offer a complimentary 1-hour initial meeting to review your current setup, and I can show you options going forward. You can book a session through this link(Calendly - Lauren Bemister )

I look forward to hearing from you.

Lauren
Kick Consulting
(https://www.kickconsulting.com.au/ )

posts.author: Callum (Callum Pithie)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Jack,

We are a small property development company based in New Zealand.

I am looking for an automation to make changes (Changes - assign person, change status and set date) to an existing item when a status is changed.

I am using the following two boards:

Automation test - Master
Automation test - Project 1

Please see attached screenshot of each board.

The Master board shows the high level stage of each project whilst the Project board shows the tasks required for each stage.

As each project progresses the Master board stage status is updated to the next stage and then automatically assign the tasks for the next stage to a person within the Project board (as well as change the Project board status to ‘Not started’ and set a date for completion of the task).

Is there an automation that is able to do this? Or a potential work around that is able to achieve the same result?

Thanks so much!

Callum

Automation test - Master1571×457 38.7 KB

Automation test - Project 11559×936 70.8 KB

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Callum - Yes, I have multiple ideas of how this could be done. I see that you’ve already scheduled a call with us at Polished Geek, so I’m looking forward to exploring this with you soon.

~ Deb Cinkus, PMP
Certified monday․com Partner
CEO & Principal Consultant, Polished Geek

Book a Consultation with a monday․com expert: https://meet.polishedgeek.com/more-with-monday

posts.author: GK57 (Gerhard Kutt)
posts.cookedHtml:
We are a company that does a lot of projects in the marine Electricals and Electronics. We offer direct sales from our warehouse as well as engineering, consultancy, project management, repair, maintenance, installation, and design of various modules from power to lights to systems monitoring to electric and hybrid drives, communications systems, Air Conditioning, water making etc.
We need to control what we do, allocate resources in terms of manpower and track our business which is very detail oriented. We feel that Monday.com is the platform to help us achieve a high degree of efficiency, communications between our people and clients, and make sure that projects run smoothly and effectively. We are looking for a consultant to help us set up best practices for our unique company.
I can be reached at gerhard.kutt@obmghk.com to set up a zoom meeting to discuss options. Thanks!

posts.author: Janice_Graydon (Janice Graydon)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Cristy,

I’m having an issue with needing to cast a formula into an email. Is this something you’d be able to help with? I’ve tried work arounds like general caster and Zapier with no success but I am new to both of them. I would love to fins someone who could be a go to consultant for these kinds of challenges if you’re available on a case by case basis?

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Janice_Graydon - If it helps, text columns can also be used by automations/integrations if formed into a proper email address. Its much easier to cast to a text column than email. If you need further assistance with General Caster or other apps, feel free to reach out any time.

Mark

Green Llamas

monday.com + Green Llamas

Green Llamas is here to help you make all your People and Projects Green. Let us get your herds under control using the monday.com platform.

posts.author: tanner_elevate (Tanner Nelson | Elevate Operations)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello! My name is Tanner and I am new to the community, but not new to monday.com

My team and I are monday.com experts, and we’ve worked on projects of all sizes. We’ve helped companies replace Salesforce with monday.com by building a more comprehensive and easier to use CRM. We’ve also help smaller businesses start to build and refine their processes by using monday.com. We pride ourselves on being able to provide you with smart data to help you make better decisions.

We love getting in the weeds, so if you have any questions about automations, linking items, dashboards, or even just need to bounce some ideas off of someone to figure out how to use monday.com, just let me know We are happy to help

Could we schedule a call so I can interview you?
melanie@soldbymelanie.ca

posts.author: greg_elevate (Gregory Thomson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Monday community!

My name is Greg. My business partner (@tanner_elevate) and I would be happy to help you figure out what Monday.com can do for you and/or your business. Our expertise includes:

  • Making processes lean and efficient
  • Informing data-driven decisioning
  • Future-proofing businesses
  • Building Monday.com to work for you!

Our solutions have helped big and small companies drive forward and confidently expand. We can build a solution for everyone from CEO to salesman, project manager to construction worker, small business owner to independent contractor, tech mogul to software developer. If you have a process, we can build it.

This work is our passion and Monday.com is our tool of choice. Feel free to contact us at greg@elevateops.io or reach out on the Monday community forums and ask us anything about Monday.com. Let us help you become a Monday believer!

posts.author: tanner_elevate (Tanner Nelson | Elevate Operations)

Gracias, y espero que tengan un bonito día!

I’ve noticed there are a few Spanish speakers looking for answers, and I am fluent in Spanish, so I’d be more than happy to help you out. Most of the threads I’ve found up to this point have been closed, but if you need someone to help you in your native language, let me know. I’m sure we can help

Thanks!
Tanner
tanner@elevateops.io
